text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten at Oi Racecourse marks the
climax of this year's dirt races. Here, Copano
Rickey will be running against Hokko Tarumae
and Wonder Acute.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oi is situated by the Tokyo Bay, and its port is
connected to the one at Tomakomai. Hokko
Tarumae explains her desire to deliver the
excitement of today's fans to her hometown.
